🐧 Ubuntu VPS Creator

Free Ubuntu VPS with SSH | ngrok + Cloudflare Tunnel

🚀 Create New VPS

📋 Connection Info

No VPS running yet
Click "Create VPS" to start

📖 How to Use

1
Click "Create VPS" and wait 2-3 minutes
2
Go to Actions tab → Click the running workflow
3
Download "ubuntu-vps-info" artifact
4
Open connection-info.html in browser
5
Copy SSH command and connect!
